title: How to automate vehicle maintenance checks

posts.author: kerri (Kerri Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: We need a recurring task automation too! We are trying to make a vehicle maintenance log, and we need tasks such as oil changes/ brake checks completed every x amount of days. Do you have any recommendations for how best to automate this?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @kerri

Thank you for posting here and welcome to the community I moved your question to a new topic since I think it was less connected to the topic you posted on which was for feature requests and I want you to get the most relevant response.

Do you have an example of the way you have set up the tasks in a board? I can then suggest the relevant automations recipes to use!

Cheers
Julia
